name: codex-bmad-planning-orchestrator
description: A Codex planning and orchestration harness for the BMAD Method by the BMAD Code Organization. It facilitates product briefs, PRDs, architecture, epics, ready-for-dev stories, conflict-free parallel work planning, and tool-agnostic handoff. It plans and orchestrates; it never writes application code.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and hand off BMAD workstreams.
interface.longDescription: BMAD Planning & Orchestrator brings the BMAD planning lifecycle to Codex: brainstorm, research, product brief, SPEC, PRD, UX, architecture, epics, ready-for-dev stories, conflict-free wave planning, and handoff manifests. It stops at planning artifacts and leaves implementation to dev tools.
defaultPrompt: Use $bmad-help to inspect my planning state and recommend the next BMAD step.
Use $bmad-init to start a BMAD planning workspace for this project.
Use $bmad-prd to draft a PRD from my product brief.
